warnings: One of 3 distinct views on sheet A-15, inventoried first: this fixture symbol/definition table (top-left of the sheet), a เคาน์เตอร์ ค.ส.ล (concrete counter) construction detail section (top-right), and a มาตรฐานระดับการติดตั้งสุขภัณฑ์ (fixture mount-height) elevation strip (bottom, full width). Split into 3 sibling files: _view1_fixture_symbol_schedule.json (this file), _view2_counter_detail.json, _view3_mount_height_schedule.json.

Content and symbol set (WC.1/WC.2/LAV.1/LAV.2/F1/PH./UR./HS./M./TR./SP./SW./K./FD.) is essentially identical to the 1-story sister houses' equivalent A-15/A-10 fixture symbol table — cross-consistent, same government housing-program plumbing fixture standard.
The table's 'หมายเหตุ' (notes) row is printed blank on this sheet.
